common.shieldCheck: Your information is protected and never shared without consent.

hero.title: Every drop
hero.description: LifeLink connects blood donors with patients and hospitals across Myanmar — in minutes, not days. Private by design: your location and contact are never shared until you say yes.
hero.browseMap: Browse hospitals needing blood near you →
hero.privacyNote: Your exact location is never exposed without consent

howItWorks.title: How LifeLink works
howItWorks.description: From emergency request to completed donation, every step is fast, private, and based on donor consent.
howItWorks.connectedNetworkDesc: Hospitals find help faster while donors remain in full control of their privacy and participation.

step1.title: Radar finds donors
step1.text: Create a request and LifeLink scans for compatible donors near the hospital without revealing their identities.

step2.title: Donors receive an alert
step2.text: Compatible donors receive the hospital, blood type, urgency, and distance while their personal data stays protected.

step3.title: Consent-based connection
step3.text: Contact details are shared only after a donor accepts the invitation and chooses to help.

step4.title: Donate and complete
step4.text: The donor visits the hospital, completes the donation, and the request is updated across the LifeLink network.

organization.title: Turn your community into a
organization.description: Create an organization, invite your members with one code, and coordinate urgent blood requests through one trusted digital space.
organization.trust2: Invite members using a single code
organization.feature1Desc: Bring donors, volunteers, coordinators, and community leaders together in one organized workspace.
organization.feature2Desc: Reduce delays by sharing urgent blood requests through a clear and focused response flow.
organization.feature3Desc: Keep donor information protected while still enabling trusted and effective coordination.
organization.ctaTitle: A stronger donor community starts with one connection.
organization.ctaDesc: Create your LifeLink organization and give your community a better way to respond when every second matters.

footer.tagline: Built for Myanmar. Every drop counts.
footer.subtitle: Connecting communities when every second matters.

login.headline: Continue making every response count.
login.description: Access your donor profile, emergency requests, hospital workspace, and community activity from one secure account.
login.emergencyAlert: Emergency alerts remain focused and consent-first.
login.loginDesc: Log in to continue managing requests, donor activity, and life-saving responses.
login.protectedInfo: Your account and personal information remain protected.

signup.headline: Your response could become someone's next heartbeat.
signup.description: Create one secure profile and receive alerts when someone nearby needs your blood type. Your location and contact information remain private until you choose to respond.
signup.detailsPrivateDesc: No public phone number, home address, or exact map pin.
signup.trustedAlertsDesc: Get notified through a focused donor-response workflow.
signup.formDesc: Set up your donor or organization profile and become part of a faster, safer emergency blood network.
signup.locationError: Could not get location — township will be used instead.
signup.locationHint: Used only to compute distance. Never shown to anyone.

dashboard.donorDesc: Manage your availability, requests, and donor activity.
dashboard.orgDesc: Manage donors and coordinate urgent requests.
dashboard.statusDesc: Keep your availability updated so LifeLink can match you accurately.
dashboard.requestsDesc: Track your requests and their latest status.
dashboard.orgOverviewDesc: Your organization details and current emergency activity.
dashboard.orgRequestsDesc: Review and manage requests created by your organization.
dashboard.coordinateDesc: Keep your organization active, respond to urgent requests, and help eligible donors take action quickly.
dashboard.telegramAlertsDesc: Get instant blood donation alerts on Telegram.
dashboard.yourOrgDesc: Join or manage a trusted donor network.

new.title: Request blood
new.subtitle: Add the essential details. Matching begins immediately after submission.
new.desktopDesc: Enter the request details and LifeLink will begin checking for compatible donors near the hospital.
new.privacyNote: Donor contact details and exact locations remain private until consent is provided.
new.whatHappensDesc: LifeLink creates the request, checks compatible donors, and opens the live response flow for tracking.

detail.headline: Respond when it matters most
detail.description: Review the request, check your eligibility, and continue through the secure response flow.
detail.consentDesc: Your location and contact details stay private until you choose to continue.
detail.matchingActiveDesc: Compatible donors have already been identified.
detail.searchingDesc: LifeLink is still checking eligible donors for this request.
detail.privacyFooter: LifeLink does not publicly expose donor addresses or exact locations.
detail.donorPrivacy: Donor identities and contact details remain protected until they accept an emergency invitation.
detail.locateDonors: Locate compatible donors, send alerts, and coordinate responses for this request.

form.formDesc: Enter the medical requirement and locate compatible donors near the selected hospital.
form.step1Desc: Choose the required blood group and number of units.
form.unitsRange: You can request between 1 and 10 units.
form.step2Desc: Set how urgently donors should be contacted.
form.step3Desc: Choose the hospital where the donor should arrive.
form.hospitalPrivacy: Donors only see the selected hospital location. The patient's home address and private information are never shared.
form.step4Desc: Add optional information to help the hospital and donors coordinate.
form.notesPlaceholder: Add arrival instructions, timing, entrance details, or other helpful information
form.errorBloodType: Please select the blood type needed.
form.errorHospital: Please select the hospital where donation happens.
form.submitNote: Your request will be created before the donor radar begins.
form.searchPlaceholder: Search by hospital name or township
form.noHospitalsDesc: Try another hospital name or township.
form.hospitalSelectHint: Select the hospital coordinating this blood request.

match.invitationUnavailableDesc: This invitation link is invalid, has expired, or is no longer available.
match.thankYou: Thank you — you may save a life today
match.thankYouDesc: Your contact details were shared with the requester. They or the hospital will contact you to arrange the donation.
match.responseRecordedDesc: No problem. Thank you for being part of the donor network. You may be alerted again when someone nearby needs your help.
match.keepPhoneDesc: The requester or hospital may call you with the next steps.
match.matchDesc: Someone near you needs your blood type. Review the request below and let them know whether you can help.
match.howReachYou: How can the requester reach you?
match.contactInfoDesc: Your details are only shared after you accept.
match.availabilityPlaceholder: For example: I can arrive after 4 PM.
match.phonePrivacy: Your phone number is never public. It is shared only with this requester after you accept.
match.reviewDetails: Review the request and hospital details below.

map.callBeforeTravelling: Call the hospital before travelling to confirm the donation process.
map.noActiveRequests: This hospital currently has no active public blood requests.

radar.radarDesc: Choose a radius, scan the network, and alert selected donors.
radar.scanningDesc: Searching within {radius} km of the hospital
radar.noDonorsDesc: There are currently no eligible donors within {radius} km. Try scanning again or choose a wider radius.
radar.trackerDesc: Updates automatically while donors accept or decline.
radar.readyDesc: These donors have responded and may be available.
radar.waitingDesc: Invitations have been sent and responses are pending.
radar.notAvailableDesc: These donors declined or are no longer active for this request.
radar.trackingDesc: Checking invitations and live donation updates.
radar.noDonorsAlertedDesc: Run a radar scan to find eligible donors near the hospital and send emergency invitations.
radar.proximityDesc: Select eligible donors directly from the radar.
radar.donorPrivacy: Donor identities remain private until they accept the invitation.
radar.donationCompletedDesc: This donor has successfully completed the donation.
radar.noEligibleDesc: Try expanding the search radius or checking again shortly.
radar.privacyNote: Names and contact details stay private until a donor accepts. Distances are measured from the hospital.
radar.emailFailed: {failed} email(s) failed. Check the server logs or verify your Resend domain setup.

chat.placeholder: Ask about blood donation, first aid...

telegram.getInstantDesc: Connect your Telegram account to receive blood donation alerts instantly — no email delays.
telegram.step2: Copy your chat ID from the bot's reply
telegram.step3: Paste it below and tap Connect
telegram.validChatId: Please enter a valid Telegram chat ID.
